components.name: com.google.javascript
components.description: Closure Compiler is a JavaScript optimizing compiler. It parses your    JavaScript, analyzes it, removes dead code and rewrites and minimizes    what's left. It also checks syntax, variable references, and types, and    warns about common JavaScript pitfalls. It is used in many of Google's    JavaScript apps, including Gmail, Google Web Search, Google Maps, and    Google Docs.

components.description: Integration with WTP XML Editor. Build multi-page editors with bi-directional updates between XML Editor source pages and Sapphire UI pages.

components.name: org.eclipse.sapphire.ui
components.description:
Framework for presenting a user interface to facilitate editing of Sapphire models. Rather than specifying the UI in terms of widgets, layouts and data binding, the developer specifies the general intent of how the data is to be presented.

SWT presentation is included.

components.name: org.eclipse.sapphire
components.description: Framework for creating models presentable by Sapphire User Interface component.
